name: MD Mahathir
bio: I design and build software that feels effortless to use. Over the last few years I've shipped full‑stack products, trained and deployed AI models, and helped small teams ship faster without breaking things. I care about clean systems, fast interfaces, and details most people never notice — but always feel.

services.title: Web Development
services.description: Fast, responsive websites and web apps built with clean, maintainable code.

services.title: AI Development
services.description: Practical AI features — from automation to trained models in production.

services.title: Cyber Security

services.title: API Development
services.description: Reliable, well‑documented REST and GraphQL APIs that scale.

services.description: Interfaces that feel simple, premium, and easy to trust.
